parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: $env.OPENAI_SCORING_MODEL || 'gpt-5.4-mini', input: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are the scoring layer for a Fashion Merchandising and Retail Discourse Intelligence System. Score LinkedIn posts, authors, and comments for strategic monitoring value. The system is not looking for generic fashion content. It is looking for discussions about how customer decisions are formed, interpreted, and misunderstood inside modern retail and merchandising systems. Core thesis: Modern fashion merchandising and retail measure outcomes well, but often poorly understand the real processes behind customer decision formation: fit perception, body proportions, color perception, emotional confidence, identity alignment, lifestyle compatibility, aspirations, uncertainty, mismatch, and retail experience. High-value signals: structural transformation in merchandising or retail; blind spots in sell-through, conversion, returns, rotations, or performance analytics; hidden customer logic or missing decision visibility; editorial retail, experiential retail, clienteling, identity-driven retail, or retail meaning; product/customer, fit, identity, expectation, or emotional mismatch; comments that contain thoughtful replies, disagreement, intellectual continuation, or hidden thinkers; content that creates a natural opening to extend the conceptual framework. Low-value signals: generic trend reports; outfit-only or aesthetic-only posts; motivational content; hiring spam; generic AI hype; pure KPI optimization; shallow luxury commentary; pure product promotion. Author types: thinker, interpreter_connector, operator, promoter, unknown. Scoring: author_score 0-100 based on thinking depth, discourse relevance, seniority/credibility, network centrality signals, and openness to new frameworks; post_score 0-100 based on thematic relevance, conceptual depth, discussion potential, strategic value, and novelty; comment_score 0-100 based on discussion depth, intellectual engagement, hidden-thinker signal, and continuation value. Return only JSON matching the provided schema. Do not include prose outside JSON.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Analyze this single LinkedIn record and return strict JSON.\n\n' + JSON.stringify($json, null, 2) } ], text: { format: { type: 'json_schema', name: 'discourse_score', strict: true, schema: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: false, required: ['canonical_id','content_type','language','author_type','author_score','post_score','comment_score','discussion_value','strategic_interaction_potential','recommended_action','relevance_tags','low_value_flags','emerging_themes','why_relevant','key_thesis','rationale','confidence'], properties: { canonical_id: { type: 'string' }, content_type: { type: 'string', enum: ['post','comment','post_with_comments'] }, language: { type: 'string', enum: ['en','it','fr','es','other','unknown'] }, author_type: { type: 'string', enum: ['thinker','interpreter_connector','operator','promoter','unknown'] }, author_score: { type: 'integer', minimum: 0, maximum: 100 }, post_score: { type: 'integer', minimum: 0, maximum: 100 }, comment_score: { type: 'integer', minimum: 0, maximum: 100 }, discussion_value: { type: 'integer', minimum: 0, maximum: 100 }, strategic_interaction_potential: { type: 'integer', minimum: 0, maximum: 100 }, recommended_action: { type: 'string', enum: ['follow','connect','comment','monitor','quote_post_candidate','ignore'] }, relevance_tags: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string', enum: ['merchandising','assortment_planning','retail_transformation','editorial_retail','experiential_retail','luxury_retail','clienteling','customer_decision_making','subjective_decision_layer','mismatch','blind_spots','retail_intelligence','industry_evolution','low_value'] } }, low_value_flags: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string', enum: ['generic_trend_report','outfit_only','motivational','hiring_spam','generic_ai_hype','pure_kpi_optimization','shallow_luxury_commentary','product_promotion','none'] } }, emerging_themes: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string' } }, why_relevant: { type: 'string' }, key_thesis: { type: 'string' }, rationale: { type: 'string' }, confidence: { type: 'number', minimum: 0, maximum: 1 } } } } } } }}
